title: iPhone Charger Cable 2M 2Pack, [Apple MFi Certified] iPhone Cable Fast Charging Nylon Braided USB to Lightning Cable Lead, iphone Lead wire for Apple iphone 14 13 12 11 Pro Max X 8 7 6 Plus,iPad iPods
features: MFi Certification Assurance: This USB to Lightning cable carries MFi certification. The iPhone charging lead is constructed with Apple’s original terminal and an embedded smart chip, enabling rapid data transfer, seamless syncing, and efficient charging. Frequent connection pop-ups are eliminated, and the iPhone charging wire delivers a safe, stable current to your device, supporting charging safety for your iPhone.

Fast Charging & Transmission: Crafted with premium copper wire, this lightning cable for iPhone effectively enhances both charging and data transfer performance. Supporting a 2.4A high-current output, the fast charging cable significantly accelerates charging speed compared to ordinary cables. When paired with an Apple charger cable, it achieves a data transmission rate of up to 480Mbps, ensuring both charging and data transfer efficiency are upgraded simultaneously.

Full-Scenario Compatibility: Our Apple lightning cable is compatible with a wide range of iPhone models, including iPhone 14/14 Pro/14 Pro Max/14 Plus, iPhone 13/13 Pro/13 Pro Max/13 mini, iPhone 12/12 Mini/12 Pro/12 Pro Max, iPhone 11/11 Pro/11 Pro Max, XS Max/XS/XR/X, 8 Plus/8, 7 Plus/7, 6 Plus/6, 6S Plus/6S, 5S/5C, and more. Note: A 20W or above USB-A Power Adapter is required to maximize performance with this Apple iPhone charger cable.

Durable Structural Design：Built with exceptional durability in mind, this Apple charging cable undergoes rigorous testing to prove its resilience—effortlessly enduring over 20,000 repeated bends and withstanding up to 20kg of tensile force without compromise. The USB lightning cable features a user-friendly design that resists frustrating tangles, stays neatly organized during storage, and maintains reliable performance over time, ultimately ensuring an extended and hassle-free service life.

What You Get: Includes a standard 2 pack of 1m iPhone charger cables in combined packaging, with each iPhone charging cable covered by a 12-month support. Our round the-clock customer service is available to assist with any issues, offering complete peace of mind with the two-cable setup. With an ideal 2-meter length, this Apple charging cable effortlessly adapts to various scenarios—Enabling convenient in-car charging, and providing flexible use at home, in the office, or on the go.
description: 2Pack 2M USB-A to lightning cable Feature： Type: USB A to Lightning Length：2M + 2M : Black Transmission speed: 480 Mbit/s Important Notes 1.This iPhone charger wire supports fast charging; however, to activate this feature, a 20W or higher power USB-A wall charger is required. Please note that a USB-C wall charger is not compatible with this USB-A to Lightning cable. 2.This product is a USB-A to Lightning cable. Please verify the interface type of your device before purchase to ensure compatibility. Super durable Apple fast charging data cable MFi certification, worry-free compatibility This Lightning fast charging cable is MFi certified and specially designed for Lightning interface devices. It ensures every charge is safe, stable, and uninterrupted, offering full compatibility with Apple’s original charger. You can achieve the same fast charging performance as with an original Apple cable. Extremely durable, flexible and convenient to use This Apple data cable has endured over 20,000 bend tests and features thicker internal copper wires that greatly enhance durability. Its exceptional flexibility helps prevent tangling, effectively extending the cable's service life. Fast charging and synchronization, efficiently balancing both This Apple fast charging cable automatically identifies and matches power requirements, supporting up to 2.4A fast charging output while maintaining a stable data transfer rate of 480 Mb/s. It allows simultaneous charging and data syncing without interference.
